description: MapleStory Avatar Component Reference Library for accurate card art generation

golden-bulldog.name: Golden Bulldog
golden-bulldog.nameTh: บูลด็อกทอง
golden-bulldog.description: Small golden/yellow bulldog pet sitting on top of head
golden-bulldog.promptKeywords: golden bulldog hat, small yellow dog sitting on head, pet hat

transparent-hat.name: Transparent Hat
transparent-hat.nameTh: หมวกโปร่งใส
transparent-hat.description: Invisible hat slot - shows hair only
transparent-hat.promptKeywords: no hat, no headwear, hair visible on top

santa-hat.name: Santa Hat
santa-hat.nameTh: หมวกซานต้า
santa-hat.description: Red and white Christmas santa hat with white pom-pom
santa-hat.promptKeywords: red santa hat, white fur trim, white pom-pom ball on tip

amber-soprano.name: Amber Soprano Hair
amber-soprano.nameTh: ผมแอมเบอร์โซปราโน
amber-soprano.description: Very long wavy golden/amber blonde hair flowing past shoulders, asymmetrical with more hair on one side
amber-soprano.promptKeywords: very long wavy golden blonde hair, amber colored, flowing down MORE ON ONE SIDE, asymmetrical, voluminous waves past shoulders

white-shades.name: White Shutter Shades
white-shades.nameTh: แว่นชัตเตอร์ขาว
white-shades.description: White shutter shades with horizontal slat blinds style, venetian blind sunglasses
white-shades.promptKeywords: white shutter shades, horizontal slat blinds style sunglasses, white plastic frame with horizontal bars/slats across the lenses like venetian blinds, NOT solid lenses

emerald-strong-stare.name: Emerald Strong Stare 12
emerald-strong-stare.promptKeywords: rectangular sunglasses, white frame, strong stare expression

santa-beard.name: Santa Beard
santa-beard.nameTh: เคราซานต้า
santa-beard.description: White fluffy santa beard covering lower face, curly white facial hair
santa-beard.promptKeywords: white fluffy santa beard, curly white beard, covers chin and mouth area

harp-seal.name: Harp Seal Costume
harp-seal.nameTh: ชุดแมวน้ำฮาร์ป
harp-seal.description: Full body white seal onesie/overall, puffy white costume covering entire body, cute seal design
harp-seal.promptKeywords: white harp seal onesie, full body white seal costume, puffy white overall, cute seal suit

paladin-hammer.name: Paladin Hammer
paladin-hammer.nameTh: ค้อนพาลาดิน
paladin-hammer.description: Large ornate golden hammer with detailed engravings, two-handed paladin class weapon
paladin-hammer.promptKeywords: large golden paladin hammer, ornate gold hammer, detailed engravings, two-handed weapon

healthy-skin.name: Healthy Skin
healthy-skin.nameTh: ผิวสุขภาพดี
healthy-skin.promptKeywords: dark skin, dark brown skin tone, healthy skin

floating-island.name: Floating Green Island
floating-island.nameTh: เกาะลอยฟ้าสีเขียว
floating-island.description: Small floating green grassy island platform with bright blue sky and white clouds
floating-island.promptKeywords: floating green grassy island platform, bright blue sky, white fluffy clouds, MapleStory background

generationSettings.defaultStyle: MapleStory 2D pixel art sprite, chibi character, exact game aesthetic, clean pixel art, vibrant saturated colors
